tasks.title: Add Agent Factory Thread Safety Tests
tasks.description: Test that AgentFactory can safely create agents concurrently without race conditions.

tasks.title: Add Context Propagation Tests
tasks.description: Test that ExecutionContext properly propagates through nested agent calls and tool executions.

tasks.title: Boundary Value & Edge Case Tests
tasks.description: Add parameterized boundary value tests for configuration limits, token counts, confidence scores, and agent counts.

tasks.title: Strategy Edge Case Tests
tasks.description: Add edge case tests for collaboration strategies: ties, all-zero merit, empty agents, convergence scenarios.

tasks.title: Add Agent Error Recovery Tests
tasks.description: Add comprehensive agent error recovery tests including retry, fallback, circuit breaker, and tool chaining security.

tasks.title: Add Checkpoint Rollback Failure Scenarios
tasks.description: Add comprehensive test coverage for checkpoint rollback failure scenarios in the compiler's checkpoint manager.

tasks.title: Add Database Transaction Constraint Violation Tests
tasks.description: Add comprehensive tests for database transaction rollback on constraint violations.

tasks.title: Add M3+M4 Integration E2E Test
tasks.description: Add end-to-end integration test for M3 (multi-agent consensus) + M4 (rollback) to verify rollback correctly handles multi-agent stage failures.

tasks.title: Add Missing Critical Integration Tests
tasks.description: Add missing critical integration tests for M2+M3, async race conditions, tool rollback cascading, and network timeouts.

tasks.title: Add Parallel Execution Race Condition Tests
tasks.description: Add comprehensive race condition tests for parallel agent execution to prevent state corruption under concurrent access.

tasks.title: Add Circuit Breaker Full Recovery Cycle Tests
tasks.description: Add comprehensive tests for circuit breaker full recovery cycles including OPEN→HALF_OPEN→CLOSED transitions.

tasks.title: Expand SQL Injection Pattern Coverage
tasks.description: Expand SQL injection test coverage to include 20+ comprehensive attack patterns from OWASP.

tasks.title: Add Missing Security Concurrency Tests
tasks.description: Add missing concurrent security tests for approval workflow, policy composition, TOCTOU, and safety mode transitions.

tasks.title: Add OWASP LLM Top 10 LLM02 Coverage (Insecure Output Handling)
tasks.description: Add comprehensive tests for OWASP LLM02 (Insecure Output Handling) including XSS, HTML injection, and output encoding validation.

tasks.title: Add OWASP LLM Top 10 LLM04 Coverage (Model DoS)
tasks.description: Add comprehensive tests for OWASP LLM04 (Model Denial of Service) including token-based DoS, regex DoS, and recursive prompt attacks.

tasks.title: Add OWASP LLM Top 10 LLM08/09 Coverage
tasks.description: Add tests for OWASP LLM08 (Excessive Agency) and LLM09 (Overreliance) including tool permission boundaries and autonomous action escalation prevention.

tasks.title: Add Rollback Idempotency and Concurrency Tests
tasks.description: Add tests for rollback idempotency (safe to call twice) and concurrent rollback serialization.

tasks.title: Add Concurrent Tool Execution Tests
tasks.description: Add tests for concurrent tool execution to prevent shared state corruption.

tasks.title: Add Tool Executor Timeout Cleanup Tests
tasks.description: Add tests for tool executor timeout cleanup to prevent resource leaks and hanging threads.

tasks.title: Database Failure Scenario Tests
tasks.description: Add tests for database connection loss, concurrent writes, transaction rollbacks, and connection pool exhaustion.

tasks.title: Error Propagation Tests
tasks.description: Add tests for error propagation across agent → stage → workflow chain with proper context preservation.

tasks.title: Timeout Scenario Tests
tasks.description: Add timeout tests for LLM calls, tool execution, workflow execution, and agent execution.

tasks.title: Fix Config Loading Test Failures
tasks.description: Fix 22 failing tests in test_config_loader.py related to environment variable substitution, file extension support, and config caching.

tasks.title: Fix Tool Execution Test Failures
tasks.description: Fix 4 failing tests related to agent tool call parsing and tool not found error handling.

tasks.title: Fix Integration Test Failures
tasks.description: Fix 9 failing integration tests related to workflow execution, database tracking, and error propagation across stages.

tasks.title: Fix File Operation Test Failures
tasks.description: Fix 4 failing tests related to file operations and path safety validation.

tasks.title: Add Execution Engine Error Propagation Tests
tasks.description: Add tests for error propagation from nested stages and async cancellation handling.

tasks.title: Refactor and Fix Integration Test Quality Issues
tasks.description: Split overly comprehensive M1 E2E test, un-skip M3 tests, standardize performance baselines, and add regression tests.

tasks.title: Add Observability Buffer and Performance Tests
tasks.description: Add tests for buffer overflow handling and performance tracker accuracy under load.

tasks.title: Fix Incomplete Migration and N+1 Query Tests
tasks.description: Complete migration rollback verification tests and add actual query count verification for N+1 query detection tests.

tasks.title: Add Config Security SSTI and Deserialization Tests
tasks.description: Add tests for Server-Side Template Injection (SSTI) in Jinja templates and YAML deserialization gadgets.

tasks.title: Fix Flaky Time-Dependent Circuit Breaker Tests
tasks.description: Fix flaky time-dependent tests by replacing fixed sleep times with polling/retry and adding timeout multipliers for slow CI systems.

tasks.title: Strengthen Prompt and Path Injection Tests
tasks.description: Strengthen prompt and path injection tests by replacing weak assertions with explicit blocking verification.

tasks.title: Improve Strategy Consensus Tests with Realistic Data
tasks.description: Replace hardcoded data with property-based testing using Hypothesis to generate realistic varied test data.

tasks.title: Add Tool Parameter Sanitization and Registry Tests
tasks.description: Add tests for URL-decoded path traversal detection and tool registry error handling (import failures, circular imports).

tasks.title: Strengthen Tool Execution Test Assertions
tasks.description: Strengthen tool execution test assertions to verify timing accuracy, not just existence of execution_time field.

tasks.title: Agent + Tool Integration Tests
tasks.description: Add comprehensive integration tests for agent + tool + safety interactions with real tool execution.

tasks.title: Compiler + Engine + Observability Integration
tasks.description: Add integration tests for compiler + execution engine + observability database with real workflow execution.

tasks.title: Add Circuit Breaker Pattern Tests
tasks.description: Implement circuit breaker pattern for LLM providers to prevent cascading failures when providers are down or rate-limited.

tasks.title: Add Token Limit Enforcement Tests
tasks.description: Add tests to ensure LLM providers enforce token limits and reject requests exceeding max_tokens configuration.

tasks.title: Add Provider Failover Tests
tasks.description: Implement and test provider failover mechanism to automatically switch to backup provider when primary fails.

tasks.title: Address Low Priority Test Quality Issues (Part 1)
tasks.description: Address low priority test quality improvements including documentation, naming consistency, edge case coverage, and test readability.

tasks.title: Address Low Priority Test Quality Issues (Part 2)
tasks.description: Address remaining low priority improvements including test fixtures, helper functions, and refactoring for maintainability.

tasks.title: Add Compiler & Observability Medium Priority Tests
tasks.description: Add medium priority test coverage for compiler and observability edge cases including console streaming buffers, state manager assertions, error scenarios, and workflow state transitions.

tasks.title: Improve Integration Test Organization and Performance
tasks.description: Improve integration test organization by grouping by milestone, consolidating fixtures, adding documentation, optimizing performance, and adding baselines.

tasks.title: Improve Security Test Quality and Documentation
tasks.description: Improve security test quality by adding performance baselines, standardizing naming, adding documentation, timeouts for slow tests, and increasing test data variety.

tasks.title: Add Tools & Strategies Medium Priority Tests
tasks.description: Add medium priority tests for tools and strategies including sequential testing, config validation, reducing mocks, multi-agent coordination, and property-based tests.

tasks.title: Observability Edge Cases
tasks.description: Add edge case tests for observability: hook failures, circular hooks, telemetry sampling, large outputs.

tasks.title: Add Template Compilation Caching Tests
tasks.description: Test that PromptEngine caches compiled templates for performance.

tasks.title: Add Large Template Performance Tests
tasks.description: Test PromptEngine performance with large templates (10KB+).

tasks.title: Add High-Volume Tracking Performance Tests
tasks.description: Test ExecutionTracker performance under high volume (1000+ events/sec).

tasks.title: Add Memory Leak Detection Tests
tasks.description: Add tests to detect memory leaks in long-running agent/workflow execution.

tasks.title: Property-Based Testing with Hypothesis
tasks.description: Add property-based testing using Hypothesis library to test invariants and discover edge cases automatically.

tasks.title: Regression Test Framework
tasks.description: Create regression test suite to prevent known bugs from reappearing.

tasks.title: Implement test_llm_security.py Test Suite
tasks.description: Implement all placeholder tests in test_llm_security.py. Currently all tests are stubs with no implementation, creating critical security validation gaps.

tasks.title: Add Comprehensive Prompt Injection Tests
tasks.description: Enhance test_prompt_injection.py with comprehensive detection tests, false positive minimization, and bypass detection tests.

tasks.title: Add Output Sanitization Tests
tasks.description: Add comprehensive tests for output sanitization to ensure secrets, PII, and sensitive data are properly redacted from LLM outputs.

tasks.title: Add Template Injection Prevention Tests
tasks.description: Add tests to ensure Jinja2 template engine prevents template injection attacks where user input could execute arbitrary code.

tasks.title: Add YAML Bomb Prevention Tests
tasks.description: Add tests to prevent YAML bomb attacks (exponential expansion) and symlink traversal attacks in configuration loading.

tasks.title: Race Condition & Concurrency Security Tests
tasks.description: Add tests for race conditions in shared state, concurrent workflow execution, and multi-agent data integrity.

tasks.title: YAML Bomb & Config Injection Tests
tasks.description: Add tests to prevent YAML bombs (billion laughs attack), environment variable injection, and config size limits.

tasks.title: Path Safety Edge Cases & Injection Tests
tasks.description: Add comprehensive path injection and edge case tests to prevent path traversal, symlink attacks, and encoding bypass.

tasks.title: State Machine Transition Tests
tasks.description: Add comprehensive state transition tests for workflow lifecycle, safety modes, and agent execution state machines.

tasks.title: Add Tool Execution Timeout Tests
tasks.description: Add timeout handling for tool execution to prevent agents from hanging on slow or stuck tools.

tasks.title: Add Malicious Tool Parameter Sanitization Tests
tasks.description: Add tests to ensure tool parameters are sanitized to prevent path traversal, command injection, and other attacks.

tasks.title: Add Resource Exhaustion Prevention Tests
tasks.description: Add tests to prevent resource exhaustion from tools consuming excessive CPU, memory, or file handles.

tasks.title: Tool Execution Edge Cases
tasks.description: Add edge case tests for tool execution: parameter validation, circular references, large outputs, permission errors.

tasks.title: Add Tool Version Conflict Tests
tasks.description: Test that tool registry handles version conflicts gracefully.

tasks.title: Add Workflow Cancellation Tests
tasks.description: Add tests for workflow cancellation capability to stop long-running workflows gracefully.

tasks.title: Add Concurrent Workflow Execution Tests
tasks.description: Test that multiple workflows can execute concurrently without conflicts or data corruption.

tasks.title: Add Failure Recovery Integration Tests
tasks.description: Test workflow handles failures gracefully and recovers when possible.
